MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.
Appearances: Brian C. Johnson of the Chanler Group (510.848.8880) for plaintiff and moving party; no other appearances.
